title: Kubernetes Cost Controls for Startups
excerpt: Practical ways to keep cloud bills predictable while you scale from MVP to production traffic.
author: Anh Th

sections.heading: Right-size before you optimize
sections.content: Start with resource requests based on measured usage, not guesses. Most early-stage clusters are over-provisioned by 40–60%.

sections.heading: Autoscaling with guardrails
sections.content: HPA and cluster autoscaler help, but cap maximum nodes and set budget alerts. Combine spot instances for non-critical workloads.

sections.heading: Cost observability
sections.content: Tag every workload by team and environment. Review cost per feature monthly — it changes prioritization conversations quickly.
